加菲猫卡丁车：激情竞速
Hot Dogs, Horseshoes and Hand Grenades
尼克儿童频道全明星大乱斗

meta.displayName: We Love Katamari REROLL+ Royal Reverie
We Love Katamari REROLL+ Royal Reverie

additionalSearchStrings: 人见人爱的块魂 安可+ 国王大人的小小回忆

thunderstore.displayName: We Love Katamari REROLL+ Royal Reverie

thunderstore.shortDescription: Polite mayhem awaits! Hurl traps, swing bats, and detonate all in sight as you vie to be the last gentleman standing. Refined chaos for up to 8 players - anything goes, so long as it's done with class!

additionalSearchStrings: 亚路塔：狐狸狐途的面包冒险

meta.displayName: Angry Birds VR: Isle of Pigs

r2modman.steamFolderName: Angry Birds VR Isle of Pigs

meta.displayName: Angry Birds VR: Isle of Pigs

thunderstore.displayName: Angry Birds VR: Isle of Pigs
thunderstore.shortDescription: Join Red, Chuck, Bomb & the Blues to save the stolen eggs in Angry Birds VR: Isle of Pigs, an immersive VR adventure! Discover the island where the greedy pigs vacation, slingshot your way to defeat Dr. Frankenswine & create/share/discover an infinite number of levels with the online level builder.
Score goals with dungballs in Beetleball, the Greatest Online Multiplayer Class-based Dung Beetle Soccer Game TO EVER EXIST
Big Ambitions is a revolutionary role-playing business sim. Go from nothing to the biggest entrepreneur in New York by opening small businesses or slowly building huge corporations any way you like.
The Bloons are back and better than ever! Get ready for a massive 3D tower defense game designed to give you hours and hours of the best strategy gaming available.

Welcome to Mt. Holly, where every dawn unveils a new mystery. Navigate through shifting corridors and ever-changing chambers in this genre-defying strategy puzzle adventure. But will your unpredictable path lead you to the rumored Room 46?
Ready your pack, grab your walking stick and step into a world of mystery. Craft your character and immerse yourself in the enchanted lands of Braided Shore.
The golden age of violent flash games now in your VR headset. Fully physics based combat with melee and firearms featuring copious amounts of blood, gore and destruction.

An online Co-op game about breaking into houses and causing havoc as a tiny gnome. Avoid danger, repurpose stolen household items, and complete tasks to meet the High-Gnome’s demands. Craft equipment and upgrade your home to make your missions easier and more successful.
Carrier Deck is a fast paced time management game where you play as the Air Boss on board the CVN-76 in the midst of active war.

Cave Crawlers is a 1-10 player rogue lite set deep underground in a system of randomly generated caves. Players use weapons, spells, and talents to defeat the unique bosses and enemies found in each biome.

additionalSearchStrings: 放松时光：与你共享Lo-Fi故事

thunderstore.shortDescription: Time to clock in at DE NILE SHIPPING, the world's most efficient warehouse! Work together in online co-op with up to 4 players to fulfill orders of increasingly chaotic, physics-based boxes. Time is money, and safety is no concern... just try not to crash out!

You saw an Ad about someone needing help with an odd job, retrieving his daughters missing dolls. Sounding like easy cash, you leave a message telling him you are interested. but as the nights progress, you realize why nobody else wanted to take this job.

CRYO is a multiplayer co-op survival horror for 1-4 players. You have been deployed by your company to various locations around the Antarctic due to communication issues. What awaits you in these dark, remote regions is far more sinister than a technical fault...
Starts as Boggle, ends as Schrodinger - Cursed Words is a roguelike adventure about writing words... for a while, until words become NUM83R5, or chess pieces, or the infinite void.

An online VR co-op horror game about delivering parcels into haunted mines. Avoid monsters, drop off packages, and pray you reach the quota! Team up with up to 3 other delivery goblins, survive your shift and pay back your student loans.

Ducks like to race, even in their own cars! Earn money by delivering food to fellow ducks in the city, then use this money to upgrade your vehicle. The better the vehicle, the better chance you have to win the race at the end of the day!

The Animal Evolution Roguelite. Hunt, Flee, Scavenge and Thrive in a living ecosystem. Choose from 125+ Evolutions and Specialisations for unique creature combinations in every run. Adapt to survive the natural curve in order to beat carcinisation... or get Darwin'd trying!

meta.displayName: Five Nights at Freddy's: Into the Pit
Five Nights at Freddy's: Into the Pit

r2modman.dataFolderName: Five Nights at Freddy's Into the Pit_Data
r2modman.steamFolderName: Five Nights at Freddy's Into the Pit
exeNames: Five Nights at Freddy's Into the Pit.exe
additionalSearchStrings: 玩具熊的五夜惊魂：陷落球池
玩具熊的五夜后宫：陷入球池

thunderstore.displayName: Five Nights at Freddy's: Into the Pit

thunderstore.shortDescription: An online 1-6 player co-op "casino crawler" where you and your friends share one bank account and one massive debt. Gamble, buy sketchy items, make terrible decisions, and climb an ominous casino tower to hit your loan shark's daily quota in 5 minutes - or face the consequences.

meta.displayName: Getting Over It with Bennett Foddy
Getting Over It with Bennett Foddy

additionalSearchStrings: 和班尼特福迪一起攻克难关

thunderstore.displayName: Getting Over It with Bennett Foddy
thunderstore.shortDescription: A game I made for a certain kind of person. To hurt them.
A co-op cleaning game where you have to clean and rearrange a dungeon before the next adventurers come to complete it again.
Run, jump, and climb using only your hands. Play tag or infection with people online. Run away from the infected players, or outmaneuver the survivors to catch them. Embrace your inner ape.
You have to escape Granny and Grandpa...You have five days...

Destroy... Absorb... Grow... GRIME is a fast and unforgiving Action-Adventure RPG in which you crush your foes with living weapons that mutate form and function, and then consume their remains with a black hole to strengthen your vessel as you break apart a world of anatomical horror and intrigue.
The Floor is Hot Lava! Run, jump, climb, and surf across nostalgia-packed environments flooded with hot molten lava. Explore alone, or join your friends. And whatever you do, don't touch the floor.

In Silence is a multiplayer horror game. One player takes on the role of the monster who has hypersensitive hearing abilities and is almost completely blind. The other players(2-6) play as survivors, trying to escape or hunting the monster.

Team up with your friends and build a thriving trade empire in this CO-OP strategy and economy simulation set on a lively island. Begin with a small market, share tasks, manage production chains, raise livestock, and dominate the economy together through changing seasons and dynamic festivals!

meta.displayName: Spooky's Jump Scare Mansion: HD Renovation

r2modman.steamFolderName: Spooky's Jump Scare Mansion HD Renovation

meta.displayName: Spooky's Jump Scare Mansion: HD Renovation

thunderstore.displayName: Spooky's Jump Scare Mansion: HD Renovation
thunderstore.shortDescription: Can you survive 1000 rooms of cute terror? Or will you break once the cuteness starts to fade off and you're running for your life from the unspeakable hideous beings that shake and writhe in bowels of this house? They wait for you, they wait and hunger for meeting you.
Jump Space (formerly Jump Ship) is a mission based co-op PvE for 1-4 players, where you are the crew of a spaceship.

Lootun is a Semi-Idle RPG with a strong focus on Character/Skill Progression, Item Hunting, and Inventory Management. Assemble a team of adventurers and send them off to clear missions while you Craft, Upgrade and Enchant the Loot!

additionalSearchStrings: 失落的天空：岛屿创造者

thunderstore.shortDescription: A shooting dopamine machine! Lucky shot is a roguelike mag-builder FPS where you master different weapons, discover unique combos, and break the game to reach massive high scores.

Paint yourself to blend in! "Meccha Chameleon" is a new-sensation hide-and-seek game where you paint your white body to mimic the stage. Spot, pose, and "artistic skill" are keys to survival. Deceive Seekers with techniques that put chameleons to shame! Supports public matches and streaming.

Build the ultimate cat army through tactical breeding and send them into deep, challenging turn-based adventures. Draft abilities, collect items, and manipulate genetics across generations in this roguelike tactics game from the creators of The Binding of Isaac and The End is Nigh.

Minos is a maze-building roguelite where you, the fabled Minotaur, must defend your sanctuary from bloodthirsty adventurers. Design and re-design deadly labyrinths, set traps, and turn every brave fool into your next victim.

MiSide: Zero is a fan made prequel and reimagining of the base MiSide story, with major rewrites to world mechanics, plotlines, and character arcs. It follows the blonde player from Beyond the World—nicknamed "Zero"—as he explores MiSide about a year before the events of the base game.

Build, automate, & optimize production lines across sky islands with real spatial constraints. Every production line is an open-ended puzzle: which operators to use, how to route your belts and how to fit your factory into the landscape. Your solutions, like your factories, are uniquely your own.

Virtual co-working with friends or strangers all over the world! Digital pals hang out at the bottom of the screen while you work, study, and get stuff done. Includes productivity tools, hangout spots, breaktime games, and more!

So much more than a VR drum kit. Learn to drum step by step, flex your skills with the built-in rhythm game, and build your own custom kit from a library of 60+ percussive instruments without the limitations of money or physical space. Fun, intuitive drumming for pros and newcomers alike!
Paralives is a life simulation game about building homes, lives and bonds. Through both hardship and success, where will your story take you?

Pikuniku is an absurdly wonderful puzzle-exploration game that takes place in a strange but playful world where not everything is as happy as it seems. Help peculiar characters overcome struggles, uncover a deep state conspiracy, and start a little revolution in this delightful dystopian adventure!

In this online horror co-op, you play as a scrappy goblin, scavenging dungeons, dodging traps, and fleeing monsters to feed the Goblin King-Queen. Team up with goblin pals, or go rogue, as you dive deep and cause chaos! Fail to feed them, and you might be the next meal!
Project: Gorgon is a fantasy MMORPG that allows you to forge your own path through exploration and discovery.

additionalSearchStrings: 努力，加油！一起化身西西弗斯（合作版）

thunderstore.shortDescription: Puttler is a mini-golf puzzle game featuring wacky obstacles and a charming backstory. Build contraptions to score the golf ball under par across 15 courses and over 250 unique holes to solve.
Modded Apex Legends!
Modded Apex Legends!

Roadside Research is a 1 to 4 player co-op gas station simulator. Except you're aliens. And undercover. Do very human things like restocking shelves while preparing for the invasion. Just don't get caught.

Rome has fallen! Rebuild civilization in this action-adventure survival game for 1-8 players. Fight hordes of the walking dead, build settlements, restore the Roman gods... or kick back and farm with friends.
A twisted trial of pill roulette for up to 4 players (solo or online). Pick your poison. Use experimental items to shift the odds. And remember: only one of you can survive.
A game about sledding and hanging out with friends :)
Bring more than your fists to the fight! Featuring all-new battle mechanics and characters, SOULCALIBUR VI marks a new era of the historic franchise. Welcome back to the stage of history!

Stolen Realm is a simultaneous turn-based tactical dungeon crawling looter with action RPG elements where you control up to 6 heroes, solo or through online co-op, venturing forth in adventures set in a high-fantasy, low-poly world.
An online 1-8 player golf game where everyone plays at the same time. Swing, shoot, sabotage, and finish first by any means necessary in a free-for-all rush to the hole.

Welcome to Super Psycho Baseball, a sadistic home-run hitting roguelike in which you try to conquer a gang of pitch-slinging bosses, each more psychotic than the last. Come face five fully-realized pitchers, rack up powerups, and reach the top!

Program and optimize a drone to automate a farm and watch it do the work for you. Collect resources to unlock better technology and become the most efficient farmer in the world. Improve your problem solving and coding skills.

Survivors-like with ONLINE CO-OP for 1-4 players. Team up with your wizard friends to slay hordes of dark creatures. Complete team-based objectives, unlock new upgrades and create overpowered spell synergies. Friend nor foe is safe in this friendly fire bullet hell!

additionalSearchStrings: 吸血鬼爬行者: 屠戮地牢的吸血鬼幸存者
吸血鬼探索者: 屠戮地牢的吸血鬼幸存者

thunderstore.shortDescription: From the creators of Vampire Survivors comes a turbo-charged, turn-based roguelite deckbuilder! Deal world-ending combos, blitz through infested dungeons, and master the Turboturn to obliterate hordes of familiar foes with a chaotic hand of cards.
Your next chaotic couch co-op party game is here! Drive, boost, and crash like wild with friends in this parking palooza
A creepy-cozy co-op fishing game for 1–4 players with proximity voice chat. Explore a haunted swamp for rare fish, sell your haul by the pound, and try to survive what hunts you in the dark.

Embark on a PvE survival adventure in the Age of Piracy. Fight on land and sea, solo or with friends. Build, craft and explore vast open world filled with dark secrets. Master soulslite combat and take on challenging bosses, command your ship and plunder unspoken treasures!

legacy.name: Legacy installer
legacy.description:
The legacy installer represents the default (legacy) behavior used by r2modmanPlus & Thunderstore for installing packages. The documentation for this behavior is maintained at [the r2modmanPlus wiki](https://github.com/ebkr/r2modmanPlus/wiki/Structuring-your-Thunderstore-package), although it likely does not fully describe all the game-specific edge cases

This installer is implicitly used for packages which don't explicitly declare their installers.
